message:
🐛 fix(drasi): widen "Consume stream" drawer so code snippets have room (#8233)

Drawer was pinned at w-[480px] which made Go / C# samples wrap
awkwardly and squeezed the language-tab strip. Bump to
w-[min(75%,720px)] min-w-[520px] so it scales with the viewport
and never drops below a comfortable floor.

Driven by feedback from Nandita Valsan (nvalsan@microsoft.com).
Live: https://console.kubestellar.io/drasi

Reported-by: Nandita Valsan <nvalsan@microsoft.com>

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
